title: FSR Immersive Journey
description: Immersive journey modpack making minecraft a lil more immersive they way it should be.
body:
This is my take on the whole genre of RLcraft modpack series but in a more immersive way. More animals, more stuff to find or explore. more ways to build. Dynamic visuals and sound effects to emmerse one's self into the world. Dragon's, farming, building, exploration are the main key factors contained within this version of the modpack and character customizations.

bisect hosting referral link: https://bisecthosting.com/FireSharkRealms
